hero.name: Divyansh Bhadauriya
hero.summary: I build scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications using React, Django, Python, PostgreSQL, and modern frontend technologies. Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean architecture, responsive design, and efficient backend systems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Building scalable applications with clean software engineering
about.bio:
Hello! I'm Divyansh Bhadauriya, a passionate Full Stack Developer specializing in building scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications using React, Django, Python, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern web technologies.

I enjoy solving real-world problems through clean architecture, responsive user interfaces, and efficient backend systems. I continuously learn new technologies and best practices to build reliable software that delivers excellent user experiences.

I am currently seeking Full-Time Software Engineering opportunities in MNCs while also providing freelance web development services for startups, businesses, and clients worldwide.

highlights.title: Professional Highlights
highlights.subtitle: A quick overview of my technical strengths and career objectives.
highlights.card1Desc: Full Stack applications using React, Django, PostgreSQL and REST APIs.
highlights.card2Desc: Experience with React, Python, Django, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, PostgreSQL, Git and Tailwind CSS.
highlights.card3Desc: Seeking Full-Time Software Engineering opportunities in MNCs while also accepting freelance projects.
highlights.card4Desc: Clean Code, Responsive UI, Scalable Architecture and Performance Optimization.
highlights.card5Desc: Comfortable working in Agile teams, version control workflows and collaborative development environments.
highlights.card6Desc: Experience deploying applications using Vercel, Render and GitHub.

expertise.title: Technical Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Technologies, tools, and frameworks I use to build scalable and modern web applications.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of real-world web applications demonstrating my skills in Full Stack Development, React, Django, Python, PostgreSQL, and modern web technologies.

eduJourney.title: Education & Learning Journey
eduJourney.subtitle: My academic background, hands-on learning, and software development journey.
eduJourney.item1Inst: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar University, Agra
eduJourney.item1Desc: Currently pursuing Bachelor of Computer Applications with a strong focus on Software Development, Data Structures, Database Management Systems, Web Development, and Programming Fundamentals.
eduJourney.item2Desc: Learning Full Stack Development using React, JavaScript, Python, Django, PostgreSQL, SQL, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, Git, and GitHub by building real-world applications.
eduJourney.item3Desc: Built multiple production-ready web applications including business websites, portfolio websites, and full-stack applications using modern technologies.
eduJourney.item4Desc: Actively seeking Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, React Developer, and Python/Django Developer opportunities in MNCs while also working with freelance clients.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.ctaDesc: I am open to collaborations, remote contract work, or standard full-time software engineering roles. Drop me a line or send an email directly.
